heading: Duty to maintain corporate and tax-exempt status
label: 152108 Duty to maintain corporate and tax-exempt status
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)152108(a)36:4107(f)., , §§ 107(f), 115, , 3852.Nov. 14, 1988Pub. L. 100–655102 Stat. 3851152108(b)36:4114.
amendments: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)152108(a)36:4107(f)., , §§ 107(f), 115, , 3852.Nov. 14, 1988Pub. L. 100–655102 Stat. 3851152108(b)36:4114.

children.heading: .—Corporate Status
children.label: a .—Corporate Status
children.text: The corporation shall maintain its status as a corporation incorporated under the laws of Colorado.

children.heading: .—Tax-Exempt Status
children.label: b .—Tax-Exempt Status
children.text: The corporation shall maintain its status as an organization exempt from taxation under the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 ( et seq.).26 U.S.C. 1
